---
title:        "Basic Chat with Pydantic-AI"
description:  Simple chat using Pydantic models for validated inputs/outputs.
date:         2025-01-05
image:        thumbnail.png
imagealt:     "A screenshot of the pydantic-ai-basic template"
appurl:       https://posit-ai-pydantic-ai-basic.share.connect.posit.cloud/
sourceurl:    https://github.com/posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/tree/main/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer/pydantic-ai-basic
---

::: {.panel-tabset .shiny-mode-tabset  group="shiny-app-mode"}
## Express
``` bash
shiny create --template pydantic-ai-basic --mode express --github posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer
```
:::

Simple chat using Pydantic models for validated inputs/outputs.

:::: {.grid .tags}

::: {.g-col-6}
**Components:**

* [Chat](/components/inputs/chat/index.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
**Packages:**

* `pydantic-ai`
* `dotenv`
:::

::::
